title: Verify existing implementation of truncateOnce
description: The truncateOnce utility function and its unit tests already exist in src/utils/truncate-once.ts and src/utils/truncate-once.test.ts. All 8 tests pass, covering truncation logic, unchanged strings, edge cases for maxLength < 3, idempotence on already-truncated strings, empty strings, whitespace strings, exact-length strings, and maxLength of 3.
existing_patterns: src/utils/*.ts — single-function utility modules with co-located .test.ts files
